# Enrollment (Data Source)

Data source for reading a Foundry Enrollment.

```terraform
data "foundry_enrollment" "example" {
  rid = "ri.foundry.main.enrollment.example-enrollment-rid"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `rid` (String) RID of the Enrollment.

### Read-Only

- `name` (String) Name of the Enrollment.
